slides.title: Carrying heavy things builds *age-proof strength*.
slides.sub: Few exercises transfer to real life like loaded carries. They train the grip, core and posture that aging tests.

slides.title: Carrying is natural strength
slides.body: Humans have always picked things up and walked. This simple pattern is one of the most honest tests of *whole body strength*.

slides.title: Grip, core and posture
slides.body: Holding a load while you walk lights up the hands, trunk and spine. Together they *quietly protect* how you move.

slides.title: Pick it up and walk
slides.body: Grab two weights, stand tall and walk slowly. Short, heavy, controlled trips can support real, usable strength.

slides.title: It carries into real life
slides.body: Groceries, luggage, a child on your hip. Strong carries *may help* keep everyday tasks easy for decades.

slides.title: Train to stay capable
slides.body: A strong grip is even linked to healthy aging. Carrying heavy things well is strength you actually use.

slides.title: Build strength you *actually use*.
slides.body: Vibe Health folds your movement and training into one daily score, so the strength habits that age-proof you add up.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The most natural strength move is also one of the most age-proof: just pick something heavy up and walk. 🌿

Loaded carries train grip, core and posture, and that strength carries straight into groceries, luggage and real life. A strong grip is even linked to healthy aging. Save this. 🔖
